plot_context_observations: Revenge and vigilantism are recurring motives (Sisu: Road to Revenge; Monkey Man; Weapons; One Battle After Another).
Survival/post‑apocalyptic settings appear frequently (Fallout; The Last of Us; 28 Days Later; The Long Walk).
Espionage, spycraft and covert ops recur across TV and film (Mission: Impossible series; Tom Clancy's Jack Ryan; Slow Horses; Andor).
Digital/virtual worlds, AI and tech‑centric sci‑fi are common (Tron, Tron: Legacy, Tron: Ares; Interstellar; Mickey 17; Dune references).
Historical and wartime narratives are regularly consumed (Band of Brothers; Nuremberg; The American Revolution (2025); Chief of War; U‑571).
Family, grief and intimate drama show up in prestige/arthouse selections (Hamnet; If I had Legs I'd Kick You; Hereditary).
Horror and psychological thriller tones recur (Hereditary; The Black Phone; Saw; The Toxic Avenger; Weapons).
Several viewings are franchise or sequel‑driven (Mission: Impossible catalog, Lord of the Rings trilogy, Tron films, LOTR marathon).
Music and concert/album films are present (Pink Floyd: Animals; multiple Pink Floyd tracks played).
Mix of contemporary (many 2024–2025 releases) and classic cinema (Seven Samurai, Serpico, Titanic) indicating broad temporal tastes.
viewing_summary.executive_summary: Recent watching favors action-heavy franchise films and prestige auteur releases, with a strong secondary interest in sci‑fi, survival/post‑apocalypse stories, historical/war dramas, and psychological horror — supplemented by serialized TV drama binges and music/album films.
source_gaps: Cinematographer metadata is almost entirely absent across the history (nearly all items have empty 'cinematographers' arrays) — e.g., If I had Legs I'd Kick You; Hamnet; Mission: Impossible entries; many TV series.
Several TV entries and films lack credited directors/writers in the provided data (e.g., The Pitt, Fallout, Blue Lights, many recent series episodes).
Some items have missing basic metadata fields (null art/thumb or null summaries) — examples: The Rehearsal, Warfare, Beauty and the Beast entries show null or minimal metadata.
Music track entries (individual songs) lack year/credit details in the provided history (Santana, Pink Floyd, Rush tracks have empty credit fields).
Cinematographer metadata was not present in the supplied Plex items.
